subcodes.first_line: Glorified be He Who hath sent down the verses in truth as a mercy from His presence unto all the worlds. Verily, there is no God but Him [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحان الذی نزل الایات بالحق رحمه من لدنه علی العالمین انه ما من اله الا هو
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
